name: Jaguar Uranium Corp.
summary: Part I Jaguar Uranium is a uranium exploration and development company focused on uranium discoveries. We are a junior miner engaged in uranium exploration. Our portfolio is comprised of two (2)uranium exploration projects in Argentina and one (1)uranium exploration project in Colombia. We maintain significant land holdings in Colombia and Argentina, which offer substantial exploration potential.
